sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54766" key="kata/pemptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάπεμπ-τος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n54766.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sent down</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνὴρ κ. ἐκ θεῶν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Attic.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
